remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature with trample or haste
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Put three +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature with trample or haste.
Sacrifice a creature. When you do, CARDNAME deals X damage to any target, where X is that creature's power. If the sacrificed creature was a Hamster, draw X cards.

params.TriggerDescription: When CARDNAME enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, if you don't control a creature named Boo, create Boo, a legendary 1/1 red Hamster creature token with trample and haste.
When CARDNAME enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, if you don't control a creature named Boo, create Boo, a legendary 1/1 red Hamster creature token with trample and haste.
